title: lithocarpus longzhouicus
intro: Lithocarpus longzhouicus is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae, native to southern China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus longzhouicus include potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular protective effects, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. Lithocarpus longzhouicus is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
